name: sipyourdrink-ltd/bernstein
summary: Deterministic Python orchestrator for many CLI coding agents that isolates runs in Git worktrees, enforces janitor verification and quality gates before merge, and includes a Codex CLI adapter.
evidence: README frames Bernstein as a deterministic scheduler that decomposes once, then runs agents in parallel, verifies outputs, routes retries, and merges passing work with plain Python.
The architecture notes explain why scheduling, task assignment, lifecycle management, retry logic, and heartbeat monitoring are kept out of the LLM critical path.
Quality pipeline documentation and janitor code verify concrete completion signals, configurable gates, cross-model review, and escalation before merge.
The Codex adapter invokes `codex exec --full-auto --json`, scopes the environment to OpenAI variables, declares OpenAI network endpoints, and documents recent verification against upstream Codex.
